name: Suzuka
title: Suzuka Design System
concept: Precision motorsport calm: engineering clarity, timing boards, and green trackside restraint.
inspiration: Inspired by Suzuka circuit signage, timing graphics, pit-lane discipline, and Japanese engineering understatement.
summary: Suzuka is a precision-led system built around clean surfaces, restrained green signaling, and data-forward typography that feels tuned rather than flashy.
searchText: Suzuka design system motorsport precision timing board pit lane green engineering telemetry calm
